overview: A responsive emergency help web app for quick access to emergency services in India. Features one-tap dialing for 10+ emergency numbers, live location sharing via WhatsApp and SMS, saved emergency contacts with localStorage persistence, a prominent panic button with confirmation, and dark/light mode toggle.
features: 10+ emergency service quick-dial buttons (Ambulance, Police, Fire, and more)
Send My Location using Geolocation API with Google Maps link
Save and manage personal emergency contacts
Panic button that alerts all saved contacts with your location
Dark/Light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Mobile-first responsive design with large touch-friendly buttons
Vibration feedback on panic button tap
